examples.title: C: File Operations in C
Python: File Operations in C
examples.code:
import os
import stat

# Create and write
with open('test.txt', 'w') as f:
 f.write('Hello, File Systems!\n')

# Read (sequential)
with open('test.txt', 'r') as f:
 content = f.read()
 print(f"Content: {content}")

# Direct access with seek
with open('test.txt', 'r+') as f:
 f.seek(7) # Move to position 7
 print(f"From position 7: {f.read()}")
 
 f.seek(0) # Back to beginning
 f.write('HELLO') # Overwrite

# File attributes
file_stat = os.stat('test.txt')
print(f"\nFile Attributes:")
print(f"Size: {file_stat.st_size} bytes")
print(f"Inode: {file_stat.st_ino}")
print(f"Mode: {oct(file_stat.st_mode)}")
print(f"Modified: {file_stat.st_mtime}")

# Check permissions
print(f"\nPermissions:")
print(f"Readable: {os.access('test.txt', os.R_OK)}")
print(f"Writable: {os.access('test.txt', os.W_OK)}")
print(f"Executable: {os.access('test.txt', os.X_OK)}")

# Delete
os.remove('test.txt')
print("\nFile deleted.")
